design_philosophy.goal: Maximize tax deductions with minimal effort, feeling like 'Financial Growth'.
core_principles: High-contrast elements for visibility in a car or outdoor setting.
Glassmorphism on top of deep charcoal to feel modern and premium.
Emerald green used strategically to represent earning money and driving action.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-first, Full viewport height usage.

action_button.classes: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-sm rounded-full bg-[#00D87A] text-black font-bold text-xl py-5 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,216,122,0.6)] flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all z-50

glass_card.classes: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-lg

input.classes: bg-[#1A1F25] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#00D87A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00D87A] transition-all

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing green background for premium feel

dashboard_city_night.description: Driving night dashboard, great for 'Start Shift' visual context.

receipt_scan.description: Close up of a receipt for the Rapid-Snap feature

icons.usage: Use consistently for nav icons, back buttons, and feature indicators (like camera, list, chart).

home_dashboard.layout: Full screen dark background. Top section has user greeting and quick stats. Middle section has abstract green glow or night city visual. Bottom has the massive glowing Action Button.

trip_history.layout: List view using glass_card style for each trip.

receipt_camera.layout: Full viewport camera UI mockup, bottom actions for capture.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
